page_title: Hunter × Hunter (2011) DVD and Blu-ray Releases
text:
The Hunter × Hunter 2011 series is collected in both DVD and Blu-ray format starting on January 25, 2012. Viz Media has released a licensed anime with en English dub. "Viz Media Adds 2011 Hunter x Hunter Anime". Anime News Network. Retrieved April 18, 2018. 

These are the DVDs for the 2011 version of the anime, although Episodes 13 and 26 are not included.
